title: November 28
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|November|hide31=yes}}

'''November 28''' is the 332nd day (333rd on leap years) of the year. There are 33 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1930s#1939|1939]] – [[Walter Velez]] is born.
*[[1940s#1949|1949]] – [[Jok Church]] is born.
*[[1960s#1962|1962]] – [[Jon Stewart]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Martin T. Sherman]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[James Mathis III]] is born.
*[[1979]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 92|''Star Wars Weekly'' 92]] published.
*[[1983]] – [[Emun Elliott]] is born.
*[[1984]] – [[Mary Elizabeth Winstead]] is born.
*[[1986]] – [[Daniel M. Lavery]] is born.
*[[1995]] – [[Empire's End 2|''Empire's End'' 2]] published.
*1995 – [[Droids (1995) 7|''Droids (1995)'' 7]] published.
*[[2001]] – [[Star Wars (1998) 36|''Star Wars'' (1998) 36]] published.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars Insider 85|''Star Wars Insider'' 85]] published.
*2005 – [http://www.scifi.com SciFi.com] selects [[Wookieepedia]] as its Sci Fi Site of the Week.
*[[2006]] – ''[[Legacy of the Force: Tempest]]'' published.
*[[2007]] – [[Knights of the Old Republic 23|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 23]] published.
*[[2010]] – [[Jon D'Agostino]] dies.
*[[2017]] – [[Star Wars Insider 177|''Star Wars Insider'' 177]] published.
*[[2018]] – [[Geonosis]] and [[Obi-Wan Kenobi]] added to ''[[Star Wars Battlefront II]]''.
*2018 – [[Darth Vader (2017) 24|''Darth Vader'' (2017) 24]] published.
*[[2020]] – [[David Prowse]] dies.
*[[2023]] – ''[[Star Wars: The Secrets of the Wookiees]]'' published.
<noinclude>
